# seerr_notification_lunasea (Data Source)

Read Seerr lunasea notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/lunasea.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `lunasea` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lunasea))
- `notification_types` (Set of String)

<a id="nestedatt--lunasea"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lunasea`

Read-Only:

- `profile_name` (String)
- `webhook_url` (String)
